meta.title: DeaMap - Defibrillator Map in Spain
meta.description: Find and verify defibrillators near you. Interactive AED map in Spain with over 30,000 registered defibrillators.
meta.keywords: defibrillator, AED, defibrillator map, AED near me, AED locator, defibrillator near me, cardiac emergency

home.aboutSubtitle: The most comprehensive collaborative defibrillator map in Spain
home.whatIsDesc: DeaMap is a collaborative platform to locate nearby defibrillators (AEDs) in case of cardiac emergency.
home.howWorksDesc: Use location or address search to find the nearest AEDs to you.
home.whyImportantDesc: In a cardiac emergency, every second counts. Quick access to a defibrillator can save lives.
home.collaborateDesc: If you know the location of an AED that's not on the map, you can easily add it.
home.noDeasFound: No AEDs found near this location within a 10 km radius.

city.title: Defibrillators in {city}
city.subtitle: {count} defibrillators (AED) registered in {city}. Find the nearest one.
city.findNearest: Find the nearest defibrillator to your location

emergency.step3: Ask someone to find the nearest defibrillator.
emergency.step4: Follow the AED instructions: the device guides you step by step.
